channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:
1. Apple's 2026 MacBook Pro Hits New Record Low Prices on Amazon  MacRumors
  2. The M5 MacBook Air is the best MacBook for most people, and it's just 99 cents away from its lowest price ever  Mashable
  3. Save $200 on 14inch M5 MacBook Pro 1TB 24GB RAM this weekend  AppleInsider
  4. Deals: M5 MacBook Air up to $219 off, iPad Air $300 off, 24GB M5 MacBook Pro, Apple Watch Series 11 $160 off, more  9to5Mac
  5. M5 Pro MacBook Pro just hit its lowest price yet: Save over $210  Macworld

item.title: Microsoft’s faster, less annoying Windows 11 is coming into focus - PCWorld
item.description:
1. Microsoft’s faster, less annoying Windows 11 is coming into focus  PCWorld
  2. Inside Windows K2: Microsoft's major plan to save Windows 11 and win back users before it's too late  Windows Central

  4. Not Loving Windows? Microsoft's CEO Wants to Win You Back  PCMag
  5. Microsoft releases first big update after Nadella's vow to 'win back fans'  theregister.com

item.title: I don't know if Vision Pro is alive or dead, but it is still the most sophisticated, powerful, and coolest hardware Apple ever built — and we can surely thank it for the glasses that will follow - TechRadar
item.description:
1. I don't know if Vision Pro is alive or dead, but it is still the most sophisticated, powerful, and coolest hardware Apple ever built — and we can surely thank it for the glasses that will follow  TechRadar
  2. Apple Has Given Up on the Vision Pro After M5 Refresh Flop  MacRumors
  3. 5 Reasons Why The Apple Vision Pro Failed  bgr.com
  4. Rumored Apple Vision Pro team break-up isn't a death knell for the product  AppleInsider
  5. John Ternus explains what he thinks of Apple Vision Pro  9to5Mac

item.title: Galaxy S27: Two Samsung flagships to be powered by Snapdragon, two by Exynos in some regions - Notebookcheck
item.description:

item.title: Tokyo store makes you pass quiz to buy Pokémon cards as part of anti-scalper policy - Japan Today
item.description:

item.title: May 2026 has arrived. Here’s why this is a huge month for GTA 6 - Destructoid
item.description:
1. May 2026 has arrived. Here’s why this is a huge month for GTA 6  Destructoid
  2. Take-Two CEO Addresses Grand Theft Auto 6 Price, and the Possibility for More L.A. Noire  IGN
